name: ccfa-skills
description: CCFA CCF paper-project workflow skill family.

interface.longDescription: A governed 13-skill ccf-* family for CCF/NeurIPS paper projects: idea, literature, experiments, writing, review, audit, submission, rebuttal, and family maintenance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the appropriate canonical ccf-* skill from CCFA Skills. Respect trigger boundaries, artifact contracts, venue-format routing, and renamed skill ownership.
